description: REST API specification for public endpoints used by the Markets service.

tools.name: comments_get-by-id
tools.description: Get comments by comment id. Required: id. Optional: get_positions. Returns array of Comment.

tools.name: comments_get-by-user-address
tools.description: Get comments by user address. Required: user_address. Optional: limit, offset, order (plus 1 more). Returns array of Comment.

params.name: order
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to order by

tools.name: comments_list
tools.description: List comments. Optional: limit, offset, order (plus 5 more). Returns array of Comment.

params.name: order
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to order by

tools.name: events_get
tools.description: Get event by id. Required: id. Optional: include_chat, include_template. Returns the Event.

tools.name: events_get-by-slug
tools.description: Get event by slug. Required: slug. Optional: include_chat, include_template. Returns the Event.

tools.name: events_get-creator
tools.description: Get event creator by id. Required: id. Returns the EventCreator.

tools.name: events_list
tools.description: List events. Optional: limit, offset, order (plus 23 more). Returns array of Event.

params.name: order
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to order by

tools.name: events_list-creators
tools.description: List event creators. Optional: limit, offset, order (plus 3 more). Returns array of EventCreator.

params.name: order
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to order by

tools.name: events_list-keyset
tools.description: Returns events using cursor-based (keyset) pagination for stable, efficient paging through large result sets. Use `next_cursor` from each response as `after_cursor` in the next request. The `offset` parameter is explicitly rejected; use `after_cursor` instead. Optional: limit (default: 20), order, ascending (default: true) (plus 38 more).

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return (max 500)

params.name: order
params.description: Comma-separated list of JSON field names to order by

params.name: ascending
params.description: Sort direction. Only used when order is set.

params.name: after_cursor
params.description: Opaque cursor token from a previous response's next_cursor

params.name: exclude_tag_id
params.description: Tag IDs to exclude. Cannot overlap with tag_id.

params.name: partner_slug
params.description: When set, external_partners are attached to matching events

params.name: include_chat
params.description: When true, includes Chats and Series.Chats relations

tools.name: events_list-pagination
tools.description: List events (paginated). Optional: limit, offset, order (plus 4 more). Returns array of Event.

params.name: order
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to order by

tools.name: events_list-sport-results
tools.description: List sport events results. Optional: limit, offset, order (plus 1 more). Returns array of Event.

params.name: order
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to order by

tools.name: events_comments_get-event-count
tools.description: Get event comment count. Required: id. Returns the Count.

tools.name: events_tags_get-event
tools.description: Get event tags. Required: id. Returns array of Tag.

tools.name: events_tweet-count_get-event
tools.description: Get event tweet count. Required: id. Returns the EventTweetCount.

tools.name: markets_get
tools.description: Get market by id. Required: id. Optional: include_tag. Returns the Market.

tools.name: markets_get-abridged
tools.description: Query abridged markets by information filters. Optional: clobTokenIds, closed, conditionIds (plus 20 more). Returns array of Market.

tools.name: markets_get-by-slug
tools.description: Get market by slug. Required: slug. Optional: include_tag. Returns the Market.

tools.name: markets_get-information
tools.description: Query markets by information filters. Optional: clobTokenIds, closed, conditionIds (plus 20 more). Returns array of Market.

tools.name: markets_list
tools.description: List markets. Optional: limit, offset, order (plus 24 more). Returns array of Market.

params.name: order
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to order by

tools.name: markets_list-keyset
tools.description: Returns markets using cursor-based (keyset) pagination for stable, efficient paging through large result sets. Use `next_cursor` from each response as `after_cursor` in the next request. The `offset` parameter is explicitly rejected; use `after_cursor` instead. Optional: limit (default: 20), order, ascending (default: true) (plus 28 more).

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return (max 100)

params.name: order
params.description: Comma-separated list of JSON field names to order by, e.g. volume_num,liquidity_num

params.name: ascending
params.description: Sort direction. Only used when order is set.

params.name: after_cursor
params.description: Opaque cursor token from a previous response's next_cursor

params.name: include_tag
params.description: When true, includes Tags relation on each market

tools.name: markets_description_get-market
tools.description: Get market description by id. Required: id. Returns the MarketDescription.

tools.name: markets_tags_get-market
tools.description: Get market tags by id. Required: id. Returns array of Tag.

tools.name: profiles_get-public-by-user-address
tools.description: Get public profile by user address. Required: user_address. Returns the Profile.

tools.name: public-profile_get
tools.description: Get public profile by wallet address. Required: address. Returns the PublicProfileResponse.

params.name: address
params.description: The wallet address (proxy wallet or user address)

tools.name: public-search_public_search
tools.description: Search markets, events, and profiles. Required: q. Optional: cache, events_status, limit_per_type (plus 10 more). Returns the Search.

tools.name: series_get
tools.description: Get series by id. Required: id. Optional: include_chat. Returns the Series.

tools.name: series_list
tools.description: List series. Optional: limit, offset, order (plus 8 more). Returns array of Series.

params.name: order
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to order by

tools.name: series_comments_get-series-count
tools.description: Get series comment count. Required: id. Returns the Count.

tools.name: series-summary_get-by-id
tools.description: Get series summary by id. Required: id. Returns the SeriesSummary.

tools.name: series-summary_get-by-slug
tools.description: Get series summary by slug. Required: slug. Returns the SeriesSummary.

tools.name: sports_get-market-types
tools.description: Get valid sports market types. Returns the SportsMarketTypesResponse.

tools.name: sports_get-metadata
tools.description: Get sports metadata information. Returns array of SportsMetadata.

tools.name: status_get-gamma
tools.description: Health check for the Polymarket Gamma API. No parameters. Returns the literal string 'OK' (text/plain) when the upstream is reachable, or a non-2xx HTTP error when it is not. Prefer this over running a full sync to verify Polymarket connectivity from an agent context.

tools.name: tags_get
tools.description: Get tag by id. Required: id. Optional: include_template. Returns the Tag.

tools.name: tags_get-by-slug
tools.description: Get tag by slug. Required: slug. Optional: include_template. Returns the Tag.

tools.name: tags_get-related-by-slug
tools.description: Get related tags (relationships) by tag slug. Required: slug. Optional: omit_empty, status. Returns array of RelatedTag.

tools.name: tags_get-related-to-atag-by-slug
tools.description: Get tags related to a tag slug. Required: slug. Optional: omit_empty, status. Returns array of Tag.

tools.name: tags_list
tools.description: List tags. Optional: limit, offset, order (plus 3 more). Returns array of Tag.

params.name: order
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to order by

tools.name: tags_related-tags_get-by-id
tools.description: Get related tags (relationships) by tag id. Required: id. Optional: omit_empty, status. Returns array of RelatedTag.

tools.name: tags_related-tags_get-tags-related-to-atag-by-id
tools.description: Get tags related to a tag id. Required: id. Optional: omit_empty, status. Returns array of Tag.

tools.name: teams_get
tools.description: Get team by id. Required: id. Returns the Team.

tools.name: teams_list
tools.description: List teams. Optional: limit, offset, order (plus 4 more). Returns array of Team.

params.name: order
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to order by
